ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the college */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year of establishment of the college */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the college */,
  "university_affiliation" TEXT /* University affiliation of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the course */,
  "fees" INTEGER /* Fees for the course */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_college" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the seat belongs to */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the seat belongs to */,
  "seat_type" INTEGER /* Type of seat (e.g., Government, AIQ) */,
  "counselling_type" INTEGER /* Type of counselling (e.g., STATE, MCC) */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the seat (e.g., GENERAL, OBC) */,
  "sub_category" INTEGER /* Sub-category of the seat (e.g., OC, BC) */,
  "domicile_condition" TEXT /* Domicile condition for the seat (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "seat_status" TEXT /* Status of the seat (e.g., AVAILABLE, ALLOTTED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_seat_type FOREIGN KEY ("seat_type") REFERENCES seat_types ("seat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_counselling_type FOREIGN KEY ("counselling_type") REFERENCES counselling_types ("counselling_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_domicile_condition FOREIGN KEY ("domicile_condition") REFERENCES domicile_conditions ("domicile_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_sub_category FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counselling" (
  "counselling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counselling event */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat being counselled */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the counselling process */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the student in the counselling process */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating in the counselling */,
  "counselling_date" TEXT /* Date of the counselling event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counselling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counselling_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counselling_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "counselling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counselling event that led to the admission */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who was admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., CONFIRMED, REJECTED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_counselling_id FOREIGN KEY ("counselling_id") REFERENCES counselling ("counselling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_types" (
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat type */,
  "seat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counselling_types" (
  "counselling_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counselling type */,
  "counselling_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the counselling type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the counselling type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counselling_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domicile_conditions" (
  "domicile_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domicile condition */,
  "domicile_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the domicile condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domicile condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domicile_condition_id")
)
